title: hormidium glumaceum
intro: Hormidium glumaceum, also known as the glandular hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Anthocerotaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hormidium glumaceum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Hormidium glumaceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies.
